Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: p
  DeclarePart
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: x
          ;: ;
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        ConditionalStm
          IF: if
          RelExp
            Exp
              Term
                Factor
                  Variable
                    ID: x
            OtherRelE
              CmpOp
                <: <
              Exp
                Term
                  Factor
                    INTC: 1
          THEN: write
          StmList
            Stm
              OutputStm
                WRITE: write
                (: (
                Exp
                  Term
                    Factor
                      Variable
                        ID: x
                ): )
          ELSE: else
          StmList
            Stm
              OutputStm
                WRITE: write
                (: (
                Exp
                  Term
                    Factor
                      Variable
                        ID: x
                ): )
          FI: fi
    END: end
  .: .
